name: Funnel Cake
recipeInstructions:
Combine the dry ingredients in one bowl: 3/4 cup flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon baking soda, and 1/2 cup sugar.
In another bowl, whisk together 1 egg, beaten, and 2/3 cup milk.
Stir the wet ingredients into the dry until smooth.
Heat cooking oil in a skillet or pan to 375°F (190°C).
Use a clean funnel with its small end covered by your finger. Pour batter through the hole into the hot oil.
Gently move your hand away from the opening, allowing the batter to flow into the oil and form patterns.
Fry for about 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove with two spatulas and drain on paper towels.
Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve immediately.
